queries."]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"How It Works"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Embed"}],": Query text is converted to a search"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Score"}],": Cosine similarity between query and stored vectors"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Rank"}],": Results ordered by similarity (highest first)"]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Configuration"}],"\n",["$","$L7",null,{"code":"from mnemosyne import Memory\n\n# OpenAI embeddings (default)\nmem = local_embeddings=True,\n)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Supported Models"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Model | Dimensions | Speed | Quality | Cost
